summary: Great show marred by a boomy audience‑dominant recording with only occasional soundboard splices.
review: Fans agree the concert itself was solid, but the available source is largely an audience tape that sounds muffled and overly boomy, with some seamless soundboard inserts that still don’t rescue the overall mix. The mastering is criticized for sucking the life out of the performance, making the recording less enjoyable despite a decent set.

ai_rating.rationale: Show quality is generally praised while recording quality is consistently described as poor; weighting yields an overall mid‑range rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Mostly boomy audience tape with occasional soundboard splices; seamless but the mix feels muffled and lacks clarity, mastering described as lifeless.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers note the concert was good overall but give no specific song highlights or criticisms of set pacing.
